description: Deterministic JSONLogic evaluation matrix. Outputs dictate DAG state transitions and hard-stop failures.

rule_01_covenant_failure_trigger.description: Automatic failure trigger if covenants are missing from a definitive annual filing.

rule_02_pd_boundary_constraint.description: Flags high-risk exposures for enhanced simulation. If PD > 15%, forces the DAG to route to the System 3 Quantum/VaR solver.

rule_03_uncertainty_calibration.description: Layer 8 Evaluation: Penalizes 100% confidence outputs that lack sufficient evidence quality. Detects LLM overconfidence hallucinations.

rule_04_information_gain_efficiency.description: Layer 6 Evaluation: Calculates len(new_facts) / tool_calls. If zero facts are extracted after 3+ tool calls, force recursion.

rule_05_macro_physics_contradiction.description: Layer 10 Evaluation: Catches logical contradictions. If GDP growth is negative and the system attempts a rating upgrade, block the action.

rule_06_liquidity_drift_alert.description: Continuous Surveillance: If the lookback window detects a liquidity flag, immediately suspend normal DAG flow and trigger a risk alert.
